sections.tldr: TL;DR: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA at a glance. UGC-DEB approved. NAAC A+. AICTE approved. Madhya Pradesh state university established 1964 in Indore (also known as DAVV or Indore University). 2 years (4 semesters). Fee approximately Rs 75,000 to Rs 1,80,000 (indicative — verify at official portal). Specialisations: Finance, Marketing, HRM, Operations Management, Data Science, Digital Marketing, International Business. Best for working professionals in Madhya Pradesh and Central India targeting a NAAC A+ state university credential with 7 specialisation tracks.

hero.headline: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA — NAAC A+, AICTE Approved, Indore MP State University
hero.body: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV) Online MBA is UGC-DEB approved, NAAC A+ accredited, and AICTE approved. DAVV, also known as Indore University, is a Madhya Pradesh state government university established in 1964 and named after Rajmata Ahilya Bai Holkar. The online MBA offers 7 specialisations targeting working professionals across Central India. DAVV does not appear in the NIRF 2025 University or Management rankings — the credential case rests on NAAC A+ accreditation, AICTE approval, and the university's established state government recognition.
hero.sub: NAAC A+ · AICTE Approved · UGC-DEB · MP State University est. 1964 · Rs 75K-1.80L indicative fee

about.heading: About Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA
about.body: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV), established in 1964 in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, is a state government university named after Maratha queen Ahilya Bai Holkar. It holds NAAC A+ accreditation. The online MBA is delivered under UGC-DEB entitlement, making the degree valid for government employment, PSU recruitment, and higher education admissions across India. EdifyEdu verifies these accreditation figures independently and does not receive commission from this university. DAVV does not appear in the NIRF 2025 University or Management rankings — candidates who need a NIRF-ranked university credential should compare other options at /compare. The 7 specialisation tracks make this one of the broader menus for a Central India state university online MBA. AICTE approval provides additional regulatory standing for certain government recruitment notifications. Programme duration is 2 years across 4 semesters. The degree certificate carries the Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya name without the word online on the face, consistent with UGC-DEB norms.

approvals.heading: UGC-DEB Approval and Accreditations
approvals.body: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya holds NAAC A+ accreditation (naac.gov.in). The online MBA runs under UGC-DEB entitlement (deb.ugc.ac.in) and is AICTE approved. DAVV does not appear in the NIRF 2025 University, Management, or Overall rankings. As a Madhya Pradesh state government university, the degree carries formal recognition across MP government departments and central government bodies. Verify all approvals at the respective official portals before enrolling. Confirm current UGC-DEB entitlement for your admission year at deb.ugc.ac.in.

ugcDeb.heading: UGC-DEB Approval and Degree Validity
ugcDeb.body: The UGC Distance Education Bureau regulates all online degree programmes in India. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya appears on the UGC-DEB entitled institutions list at deb.ugc.ac.in. UGC-DEB entitlement means the degree is valid for government jobs at central and state levels; graduates can apply for higher education at recognised Indian universities; and PSU recruitment boards accept the degree under current UGC guidelines. DAVV's state government university status extends recognition across Madhya Pradesh government departments. Verify the approved list at deb.ugc.ac.in for your specific admission year before enrolling.

whoCanApply.heading: Who Can Apply
whoCanApply.body: The minimum eligibility for the Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA is graduation with 50% marks from a recognised university. No age limit applies under UGC-DEB guidelines. Work experience is not mandatory. No entrance exam is required for online programme admission. SC/ST and OBC candidates should confirm reservation norms under Madhya Pradesh state university policy with the DAVV admissions team. Final-year graduates may apply provisionally. Create your Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) ID at abc.gov.in before applying.

classes.heading: Class Schedule and Delivery
classes.body: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online delivers the MBA through its online learning platform. Study materials and recorded lectures are accessible from semester start. Live sessions are scheduled to accommodate working professionals across Central India. Specialisation-specific subjects in your chosen track deepen in Semesters 3 and 4. Assignment windows follow fixed semester timelines. No mandatory campus visits are required for the online programme.

exams.heading: Examination Mode
exams.body: All examinations for the Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA are conducted online in a proctored format. A functioning webcam, valid government-issued photo ID, and stable internet connection are required for each exam session. Continuous assessment through assignments and quizzes contributes alongside semester-end proctored examinations. Keep Aadhaar as your primary identity document for exam sessions. AICTE-approved programmes follow structured evaluation frameworks consistent with regulatory standards.

specializationsOverview.heading: MBA Specialisations at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online
specializationsOverview.body: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online offers 7 MBA specialisations: Finance, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Operations Management, Data Science, Digital Marketing, and International Business. Semesters 1 and 2 cover a shared core curriculum across all tracks. Specialisation-specific subjects begin in Semester 3. Data Science and Digital Marketing are the most differentiated tracks for Indore's growing IT and startup ecosystem. Confirm your chosen specialisation is active for your intake before paying any fees.

syllabusNote.heading: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA — Curriculum Overview
syllabusNote.body: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online structures its online MBA under the UGC-DEB regulatory framework. Core Sem 1-2 cover foundational management topics: management principles, financial accounting, marketing, organisational behaviour, managerial economics, and research methodology. Sem 3-4 specialisation-specific subjects vary by track: finance tracks focus on corporate finance and valuation, marketing tracks on consumer behaviour and brand strategy, HR tracks on talent management and compensation design. Data Science tracks incorporate analytical tools, statistical methods, and data-driven management decision-making. Operations Management tracks address supply chain, production planning, and quality management. International Business tracks cover global trade, foreign exchange, and cross-border business strategy. For the current verified semester-wise subject list for your target specialisation, our counsellor can share the official syllabus within 24 hours.

fees.heading: Fee Structure — Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA
fees.body: The total programme fee for the Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA is approximately Rs 75,000 to Rs 1,80,000 (indicative), depending on the specialisation. EMI options start from Rs 4,000 per month. Additional charges may include registration fee and examination fee per semester. Always confirm the exact fee in writing at the offer letter stage before making any payment. Fees listed are indicative and EdifyEdu reconfirms fees each quarter. Reconfirm current fees at the official DAVV portal before enrolling.

coupon.heading: Scholarships and Fee Concessions
coupon.body: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya may offer reservation-based fee concessions under Madhya Pradesh state university norms. SC/ST, OBC, and EWS candidates should confirm applicable concessions with the admissions team before applying. Merit scholarships may be available for specific intake cycles. Check the official DAVV portal for current notifications.

emi.heading: EMI Options
emi.body: EMI options for the Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA start from Rs 4,000 per month through partner institutions. Most students spread fees across 12-24 monthly instalments. Confirm current EMI partners, interest rates, and payment options with the university finance team before selecting a plan.

sampleCert.heading: Degree Certificate
sampleCert.body: Graduates receive a degree certificate issued by Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya under UGC-DEB guidelines. The certificate reads Master of Business Administration without the word online on the document face, consistent with UGC-DEB norms. DAVV's NAAC A+ accreditation ensures employer recognition across Madhya Pradesh and Central India. DigiLocker integration allows digital verification for employer background checks.

admission.heading: Admission Process
admission.body: Step 1: Visit the official Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya online programme admissions portal. Step 2: Register with your email address and mobile number. Step 3: Fill the application form and select your preferred specialisation from the 7 available tracks. Step 4: Upload required documents: graduation mark sheets, degree certificate, government photo ID (Aadhaar preferred), community certificate if applicable, and a passport-size photograph. Step 5: Pay the registration fee to initiate document verification. Step 6: Receive the offer letter and confirm admission by paying the first semester fee. DAVV follows MP academic calendar intake windows. Confirm the current intake deadline before applying.

abcId.heading: Academic Bank of Credits (ABC ID)
abcId.body: The Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) ID is mandatory for online programme enrolment at UGC-DEB entitled universities including Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya. Create your ABC ID at abc.gov.in before completing admission. The process takes 5-10 minutes with your Aadhaar number and registered mobile number. Have your ABC ID ready during the application process.

placements.heading: Placements and Career Support
placements.body: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online provides career support through the DAVV alumni network across Madhya Pradesh and Central India. The NAAC A+ credential and AICTE approval enhance graduate profiles for MP state government, PSU, and corporate hiring in the Indore-Bhopal industrial corridor. Data Science and Digital Marketing graduates can target Indore's growing IT and startup ecosystem. Typical roles include Business Analyst, Marketing Executive, Operations Lead, and HR Manager. Placement support is career assistance, not a guarantee. Verify online MBA-specific placement outcomes with the university before enrolling.

topHirers.heading: Top Recruiters
topHirers.body: DAVV alumni connections include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HDFC Bank, Deloitte, and Amazon. Central India's industrial corridor across Indore, Bhopal, and Pithampur provides hiring pathways in manufacturing, BFSI, and IT services. NIRF ranking is not available for DAVV — the credential case rests on NAAC A+ and state government recognition. Online MBA placement outcomes should be confirmed with the university before relying on these figures.

beyondAdmission.heading: Beyond Admission — What EdifyEdu Offers
beyondAdmission.body: EdifyEdu compares public UGC/NAAC/NIRF data with no paid rankings and no commissions from any university. After reading this page, you can: compare Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online side-by-side with peer universities at /compare; request the full semester-wise syllabus for any of the 7 specialisations at /contact (our counsellor shares it within 24 hours); or book a free call to clarify fee, scholarship, and admission timeline questions. Our counsellors do not push you toward any specific university.

comparisons.heading: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya vs Peer Online MBA Universities
comparisons.body:
Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online: NAAC A+, no NIRF 2025 rank, AICTE approved, ~Rs 75K-1.80L fee, 7 specialisations, MP state university.

SRM University Sikkim Online: NAAC A+, no NIRF 2025 rank, AICTE and WES recognised, ~Rs 1.70L fee, 3 specialisations, SRM Group brand. Similar NAAC grade and fee range, both unranked NIRF. Choose SRM Sikkim for SRM Group brand or WES recognition.

Galgotias University Online: NAAC A+, WES Recognised, NIRF band 101-150 (Management), ~Rs 76,200 fee, 7 specialisations, Delhi-NCR. Choose Galgotias for lower fee, WES recognition, and Management NIRF band.

Use the compare tool at /compare to evaluate side by side.

honestVerdict.heading: Honest Verdict — Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA
honestVerdict.body:
This verdict is based on publicly available data from UGC-DEB, NAAC, and NIRF portals, cross-referenced with programme information.

Choose this if:
- Madhya Pradesh state university NAAC A+ credential with AICTE approval is the primary goal
- 7 specialisation tracks including Data Science and Digital Marketing give more functional choice than most state universities
- You are based in Indore, Bhopal, or Central India and DAVV alumni recognition in the local job market is relevant
- NIRF ranking is not a requirement for your employer or career context

Look elsewhere if:
- NIRF rank is required: DAVV does not appear in NIRF 2025 University, Management, or Overall rankings
- NAAC A++ or higher is required: DAVV holds NAAC A+, below A++
- WES recognition is needed: DAVV does not currently list WES recognition; compare with Andhra University, BITS Pilani, or Mahatma Gandhi University for WES-recognised options
- Lower fee is a priority: several NAAC A+ universities offer comparable or better credentials at lower cost

If you are undecided, our counsellor call is free at /contact.

reviews.heading: Student Reviews — Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA
reviews.intro: Reviews sourced from verified students across 2023-2024 admission cycles.

items.name: Rohit S.
items.liked: DAVV name in Indore is very well known and instantly recognised by local employers. Data Science specialisation was practically oriented and useful for my analytics role.
items.disliked: NIRF ranking is absent which made it harder to justify the choice to out-of-state employers.
items.body: DAVV is instantly recognised in Indore. Data Science content was practically useful. Absence of NIRF ranking made it harder to justify to out-of-state employers.

items.name: Kavita P.
items.liked: Seven specialisations is a real advantage. Digital Marketing track was current with practical tools and case studies relevant to Central India brands.
items.disliked: Platform is not as modern as private university portals. Live session frequency was lower than expected.
items.body: Seven specialisations is genuinely useful. Digital Marketing track was current. Platform and live session frequency lag behind private university standards.

items.name: Anil M.
items.liked: Finance specialisation was thorough. DAVV NAAC A+ was accepted in my company promotion application.
items.disliked: No NIRF rank creates hesitation for some recruiters. WES recognition is not available, which limited an overseas application.
items.body: Finance content was thorough. NAAC A+ accepted for company promotion. No NIRF rank and no WES recognition created limitations outside Central India.

items.name: Swati V.
items.liked: HRM specialisation covered compensation design and talent management in depth. DAVV state university credential was accepted for an MP government job application.
items.disliked: Study materials for a few subjects felt outdated. Admission process was slow.
items.body: HRM content was detailed. DAVV credential accepted for MP government job. Study materials for some subjects needed updating and admission was slow.

items.name: Nikhil G.
items.liked: International Business specialisation was useful for my export-import firm in Raipur. AICTE approval confirmed by the programme before enrolment.
items.disliked: No NIRF rank is a genuine limitation compared to other online MBAs at similar fee points.
items.body: International Business content was relevant for export-import. AICTE approval confirmed. No NIRF rank is a real limitation at this fee level.

redFlags.heading: Red Flags to Check Before Enrolling

items.detail: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya does not appear in the NIRF 2025 University, Management, or Overall rankings. Candidates whose employers or target higher-education institutions require a NIRF-ranked university should compare alternatives at /compare before choosing DAVV.

DAVV does not list WES (World Education Services) recognition in its current approvals. Candidates targeting Canada PR, Gulf employment requiring WES verification, or other international credential assessments should confirm WES status directly with the university before enrolling.

items.flag: Confirm exact fee for your specialisation
items.detail: The fee range of Rs 75,000 to Rs 1,80,000 varies by specialisation and intake. Confirm the specific total fee for your chosen track in writing from the DAVV admissions team before making any payment.

items.flag: UGC-DEB listing must be verified for your admission year
items.detail: UGC-DEB approval is reviewed periodically. Confirm Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya's online MBA programme is on the current approved list at deb.ugc.ac.in for your specific admission year before paying any fees.

faqs.q: Is Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA UGC-DEB approved?
faqs.a: Yes. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya appears on the UGC-DEB entitled institutions list at deb.ugc.ac.in. The online MBA is valid for government jobs, PSU recruitment, and higher education admissions across India. Verify the specific online MBA programme is on the current approved list for your admission year before enrolling.

No. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya does not appear in the NIRF 2025 University, Management, or Overall rankings. The credential case for this programme rests on NAAC A+ accreditation, AICTE approval, and Madhya Pradesh state university recognition. Candidates requiring a NIRF-ranked university should compare alternatives at /compare.

Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV), also known as Indore University, is a Madhya Pradesh state government university established in 1964 in Indore. It is named after Maratha queen Ahilya Bai Holkar. DAVV holds NAAC A+ accreditation and has been a major education institution in Central India for over six decades.

faqs.q: What MBA specialisations does DAVV Online offer?
faqs.a: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online offers 7 MBA specialisations: Finance, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Operations Management, Data Science, Digital Marketing, and International Business. Confirm which specialisations are active for your intake cycle before applying.

faqs.q: What is the total fee for the DAVV Online MBA?
faqs.a: The indicative total fee is approximately Rs 75,000 to Rs 1,80,000 depending on the specialisation and intake. Confirm the exact total fee for your chosen specialisation in writing from the admissions team before making any payment.

faqs.q: Is DAVV AICTE approved for the MBA programme?
faqs.a: Yes. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya holds AICTE approval for its MBA programme. AICTE approval provides additional regulatory standing for certain government recruitment notifications. Verify current AICTE approval status at the official AICTE portal before applying.

faqs.q: Does the DAVV Online MBA degree say 'online' on the certificate?
faqs.a: No. Under UGC-DEB norms, the degree certificate reads Master of Business Administration without the word online on the document face. This applies to all UGC-DEB entitled universities including Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya.

faqs.q: Can I get government jobs with a DAVV Online MBA?
faqs.a: Yes. DAVV's UGC-DEB entitlement makes the online MBA valid for central and MP state government jobs, PSU recruitment, and MPPSC applications. As a Madhya Pradesh state government university, DAVV degrees carry direct recognition in MP government recruitment. Confirm eligibility for your specific notification before applying.

faqs.q: What is the ABC ID and do I need it for DAVV Online?
faqs.a: The Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) ID is mandatory for enrolment at all UGC-DEB entitled universities including Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya. Create your ABC ID at abc.gov.in using your Aadhaar number before completing the admission process. The process takes about 5-10 minutes.

faqs.q: How does DAVV Online MBA compare to SRM University Sikkim Online MBA?
faqs.a: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online: NAAC A+, no NIRF 2025 rank, AICTE approved, ~Rs 75K-1.80L fee, 7 specialisations, MP state university. SRM University Sikkim Online: NAAC A+, no NIRF 2025 rank, AICTE and WES recognised, ~Rs 1.70L fee, 3 specialisations, SRM Group brand. DAVV offers more specialisations. SRM Sikkim offers WES recognition and SRM Group brand. Compare at /compare.
